title: Close current worktree
goal: Review and close the current dirty worktree before starting production-readiness feature slices.
forbidden_scope: Do not start S012-S018 implementation changes inside S011.
Do not delete historical rehearsal/demo job evidence.
Do not stage, commit, or push unless explicitly requested.
acceptance: Current dirty files are understood and either verified as coherent or repaired.
Focused server-executor regression passes or a real blocker is recorded.
Type-check or an equivalent package-level verification passes or a blocker is recorded.
G003 and S011-S018 are registered in .agent-board.
S011 result lists changed files, verification logs, remaining risks, and next-slice decision.
